subject: Helioptile, a small lizard-like Pokemon with frilled solar-panel appendages fanning out from its head, in a bright sunny environment
description: A small, upright lizard-like creature with a pale yellow-white body stands in a bright, warm golden environment. Its most distinctive feature is a set of flat, frilled appendages fanning out from either side of its head, which the flavor text confirms function as solar panels. The background is awash in warm golden-yellow light with soft diffuse shapes suggesting sunlight and open sky. The creature faces mostly forward with a cheerful, alert expression. The overall palette is warm and luminous, emphasizing a sun-energy theme.
foreground: small lizard creature with wide fanned head-frills, upright stance
background: warm golden-yellow diffuse light, open sky tones
